items.example: Who do you think will win the race?
He checked his speed on the dashboard.
The freerunners jumped over walls and railings.
The runners took a more direct route across the city.
They leapt across the gap between the buildings.
Do you think you can beat me in a race?
Robo-Chef is a machine that cooks for you.
You can programme the robot to make any dish.
Starting a new business is a huge adventure.
